programs.title: New: Neighborhood Wars
programs.desc: War erupts between two neighbours in a Washington, D.C. parking lot, involving traffic cones and handwritten notes; a Santa Rosa, California, neighbour wears out his welcome.

programs.title: New: Customer Wars
programs.desc: On a bus in Maryland, a heated argument between two passengers escalates to a dangerous breaking point; in a New York City pet store, a woman is asked to leave after kicking a puppy's kennel.

programs.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programs.desc: There are stories of advanced technology from the ancient past that seem too impossible to be true; these technologies challenge everything humanity thought about the innovation of ancestors.

programs.title: Outrageous Fortune
programs.desc: Secrets from the past mean Jethro gets an opportunity, and Cheryl has the chance to dig up gold.

programs.title: Head High
programs.desc: Vince and Mitch hunt for a missing player; Mana struggles with his feelings; Renee is dealt a devastating blow.

programs.title: Into The Badlands
programs.desc: Sunny reluctantly allies himself with The Widow to defeat Quinn but her actions put their uneasy alliance to the test.
